message:
Fix compilation errors, harden AD VJP rules, and add Select broadcasting for JAX parity

- Fix Rust 2024 pattern matching error in fj-interpreters partial_eval
- Fix clippy warnings: unused import, dead_code, manual_is_multiple_of, cloned_ref_to_slice_refs
- Fix VJP ReduceMax/ReduceMin test failures: Select now supports tensor cond + scalar values
- Harden Transpose VJP: return errors on malformed permutation instead of silent default
- Fix ReduceProd VJP: replace fragile ptr::eq with index-based element comparison
- Add Select broadcasting: tensor cond + scalar values, scalar cond + tensor values
- Add 3 unit tests for Select broadcasting behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -363,7 +363,7 @@ pub fn dce_jaxpr(jaxpr: &Jaxpr, used_outputs: &[bool]) -> (Jaxpr, Vec<bool>) {
         .outvars
         .iter()
         .zip(used_outputs.iter())
-        .filter(|(_, &used)| used)
+        .filter(|&(_, &used)| used)
         .map(|(v, _)| *v)
         .collect();
